name: playwright-openai-plugin
description: Installable Codex plugin and local Playwright CLIs for logged-in OpenAI/ChatGPT browser workflows and CSDN publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Control logged-in ChatGPT and CSDN browser workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installable Codex plugin for local Playwright browser automation. It helps Codex inspect, submit, wait, collect, revise, and diagnose ChatGPT web workflows through an already logged-in managed browser session without storing browser credentials. It also includes difficulty-aware ChatGPT image routing, a GPT Image prompt-router skill backed by an attributed offline prompt catalogue, and CSDN Markdown publishing automation for dry-run validation, editor inspection, draft preparation, local image uploads, cover upload, publish-settings fill, source URL fill, and readback verification.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my current ChatGPT browser session.
Generate an image and collect the result.
Find a GPT Image 2 prompt pattern for an image idea.
Check whether an image job can wait, collect, or revise.
Prepare a CSDN article draft with images, cover, tags, category, article type, source URL, and visibility.
